title: 龙与自然
description:
Make the dragon veins flow againDragon & Nature is an automation strategy game built around five-element logistics and seasonal production chains. Start with water, metal, wood, fire, and earth, then construct processing buildings, tune output rates, and guide materials into the Dragon Core.

Every recipe is part of a living flow system. If upstream production is too low, your buildings starve. If downstream output is blocked, pressure spreads across the loop. Watch the materials move, adjust rates, and refine your layout until the whole ecological belt breathes in rhythm.

• Features

Build and expand a circular conveyor loop inspired by dragon veins. 
Transform basic five-element materials into intermediate and final resources. 
Balance output rates, recipe times, and demand pressure. 
Progress through seasonal stages with increasingly complex goals. 
Fuse final materials in the Dragon Core to create Dao. 

• For players who enjoy 

Automation, conveyor belts, production balancing, and resource management. 
Eastern fantasy, five-element systems, and mystical mathematical aesthetics. 
Readable production flow, satisfying optimization, and long-term scaling.
description_short: Dragon & Nature is a guofeng automation strategy game about rebuilding an ecological conveyor loop. Balance five-element materials, unlock seasonal production chains, and awaken the Dragon Core to synthesize the ultimate resource: Dao.
